channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Public parking full of rubish, 12th March
item.description:
Public parking from Argent Street in front of Argent Court ,is full of rubish next to the fence of the pub and to the entrance next to fence to the pub.It was never cleaned and every time when the guys with the rubish they comming they turn the head and they left.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two tents, 12th March
item.description:
People are still living in this park. It's been at least two months. Bedding is hung on trees, litter around tent, addicts clearly visible as children go to school.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palatine Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins constantly placed in the road, 12th March
item.description:
These bins have been left in the road for months, this evening due to the high winds they are blocking the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Gulliver Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 12th March
item.description:
On the bend
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Place, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Drain has dropped down, 12th March

There is a man hole cover, it’s dropped a lot and making a big drop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: Light out on lamp post near to alley, Rowley Ave near to Harcourt Ave junction, 12th March
item.description:
Light out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two holes approx 10 inches wide in between the entrance of the park on Imperial Way and the slide., 12th March
item.description:
I frequently see children tripped up by the hole and fall and graze themselves on the extremely rough unkept ground. Parts of the park have been tarmacked over the years but not the entrance where most children walk through. The uneven ground has been there for over 6 years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Imperial Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White goods left by entrance to Waterside, Rectory Road, Beckenham, 12th March
item.description:
White goods left by entrance to Waterside, Rectory Road, Beckenham. Been there over a week and litter now accumulating behind it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waterside, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 12th March
item.description:
Pothole as you enter the mini roundabout from the east side (from petts wood) next to the traffic island
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light facing the wrong way, 12th March
item.description:
The light on the left hand lane is facing the wrong direction. Cars cannot see the red light and yesterday I witnessed 4 cars go straight through the red light and over the pedestrian crossing (green light for pedestrians) because they could not see the red light. This was yesterday evening 11/03/26 at 6pm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westminster Bridge Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: 2 radnor road, 12th March
item.description:
Box for tv

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Radnor Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Grass verge damaged, footpath susbsiding, drainage blocked., 12th March
item.description:
Footpath subsidence, drainage blocked and damaged, footpath uneven. Damage caused by cars accessing driveway. Previously reported ref-8810444 Updated as repaired, no signs of any repair work carried out, or preventative measures taken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle and dumped rubbish, 12th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been abandoned and rubbish dumped next to it. It has been sprayed and the number plates removed and rear lights removed. It is also leaking oil onto the road. It’s MOT expired over 6 months ago and it’s parked/abandoned on public highway and is an eyesore. Please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 12th March
item.description:
There is broken glass in the road and cycle path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gunter Grove, Brompton, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: Right across road, 12th March
item.description:
Road surface broken right across road in two places
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass on footpath and glass on road, 12th March
item.description:
Broken brown glass on footpath alongside wall and white glass to curb of road. Dangerous to pedestrians and to animals. Please help to clear. Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dinsdale Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on double red line dumping multiple black bin bags of waste in the council bins, 12th March
item.description:
I was passing by and saw an altercation between a three people. A man and a woman (white English in their 50s I’d say) with a small fiat car reg BIL 1674 (or B1L 1674) were parked on double red line unloading multiple big black waste bags into the council bins for the flats above (on West Lane). A younger man was filming them and I think had confronted them. The woman then started filming and shouting at this younger man, who walked into the communal door of block of flats. The woman film him going in, held the door open and waited to see which flat he went into. The other man was looking too. It was quite intimidating for the younger man, from what I saw at least. I stood and watched and the situation calmed a little. I took the number plate and headed home.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dixon's Alley, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 12th March
item.description:
A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found by Hackney Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
